title: acer platanoides f. crispum
intro: Acer platanoides f. crispum, also known as the crinkle-leaved maple, is a unique variety of the Norway maple tree, characterized by its leaves with wavy, crinkled edges. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been attributed to its rich content of salicin and other compounds. The health benefits of Acer platanoides f. crispum include reducing fever, relieving pain, and soothing skin irritations. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves are often used to make infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to treat a range of health issues.
